name: python3-sgmllib3k
title: python3-sgmllib3k
description:
Python 3 port of Python 2's sgmllib
sgmllib was dropped from the Python standard library in Python 3. This
package provides a port of the library to Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-sgmllib3k because Python 3 port of Python 2's sgmllib.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-sgmllib3k as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-sgmllib3k with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-sgmllib3k --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
